title: The Strongest Four-Sword Style Streamer: Since the VR Game I Poured My Life into Became Reality, I'm Going to Use My Class that was Supposed to be Abolished to Become Unrivaled
description:
Without warning, the real world synced with the game. Towers and dungeons materialized globally—now, conquer them with Quad-Wielding!

Hayate, a solo player of the ultra-popular VRMMO FWO, cherished his obscure class: Quad-Wielder. But his world shattered when he received the worst possible news: "Quad-Wielding will be removed!" Teamed up with Elena, a chaebol heiress and archer, Hayate unleashes his ultimate Quad-Wielding technique "Obscuring Moon"—all while unraveling the mysteries of the Creation Goddess. Then suddenly... the game and reality merge.
author: Kizuka Maya
